risk_title: Political and Governance Instability Constraining Implementation Capacity
risk_summary: Political and governance fragility in South Sudan is creating substantial constraints on project implementation, with the risk category rated as 'High' and persistent across reporting periods. This affects the government's ability to execute project activities and maintain institutional continuity.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], High [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04], High [Proposed Rating]

risk_summary: Macroeconomic fragility in South Sudan has escalated from 'Substantial' at project approval to 'High' risk rating, creating persistent challenges for project implementation and the sustainability of government commitments to education sector investments.
evidence_quote: Macroeconomic [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], High [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04], High [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints Linked to Governance Fragility
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability has deteriorated from 'Substantial' at approval to 'High' risk, reflecting governance-related constraints on the government's ability to execute project activities, manage finances, and sustain reforms in the education sector.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], High [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04], High [Proposed Rating]

risk_title: Refugee and Host Community Inclusion Dependent on Fragile Operating Environment
risk_summary: The project's expanded focus on refugee and host community education (Component 3, added in Additional Financing September 2024) is being implemented in a fragile context where displacement pressures and refugee hosting dynamics create implementation risks. The development objective was modified to include 'improve access to education for refugee and host community children,' indicating recognition of FCV-related pressures.
evidence_quote: Current Development Objective (Approved as part of Additional Financing package Seq. 1 on 11-Sep-2024): The Project's Development Objective is to increase skills development opportunities in teaching and digital agriculture, improve access to education for refugee and host community children and strengthen capacity for management of the education system.
